raw_text: this app is not good im ordered a pair of socks in two different order but they don't delivered in time after 1 hour cancelled only one order and showing second order delivered and now saying query window for order not delivered open for only 24 hour . my money not refunded till but in id showing order delivered. very bad experience

I've been using the blinkit app for about 4 to 5 months and honestly blinkit is a life saver app when you need things at the last time and the delivery is super fast btw the groceries and milk and other items are so fresh and well packed and the delivery partners aur usually polite and fast and thank youuuuu for inventing this app it helped me soo muchhhh at the emergencies
As advertised the order was delivered within 10 Minutes but the minor issue is that if you order a large item with other things they will deliver separately a large item.

nowadays they deducted the money from us after some minutes it is saying that payment has failed..it happened quite a few times..why deduct the money in the first place?? The customer is waiting for their essential items not your refund after 3-5 working days...it's pathetic

Don’t order electronic items from Blinkit. I ordered a charger and received a faulty product with a clear manufacturing defect, but Blinkit still refused to replace it or provide a proper resolution. This is extremely disappointing customer service, especially for electronic products where defects can happen. Amazon handles replacements and refunds much more professionally and actually supports customers when issues arise. Fast delivery is useless if the company refuses to stand behind.

update2: extremely bad service. The location does not stay on as I have pinned and keeps taking the backstreet as my location. they will then charge cancellation fees of delivery person gets confused due to a texhnical issue of the app. pathetic. Update: the app still picks my location despite not having given it location permission - not sure how that works. Older: Great value but poor app. The app annoyingly takes live gps location despite the location tagging ..

Today my payment cut and order not received also many times items are missing which I ordered and last order I checked next day and 2 items are missing but no luck call center and chat rejected due to 24 hours passed so blindly we can not trust on blinkit if this type of service they are providing.

This company is pathetic, the way they go about forcing their online video ads on unsuspecting surfers. they shamelessly hijack your screen and blocking out all your controls, repeatedly drag you to the play store, there's no button to exit this trap, rather it tries to fool you with false buttons. I'm uninstalling their irritating App from all my family devices, stopping all purchases. they deserve it.

They regularly increase the minimum threshold for free delivery, they already charge the handling fee on every single order. The delivery time always takes more than what is mentioned. But I have to say that the quality of items and packaging is actually great

I placed an order on 18/06/26 at 11:48pm, and the delivery partner marked it as delivered at 12:18am, but I never received it. I tried calling the delivery partner more than twenty times, but he didn’t receive the package. After this, I reached out to customer care, only to find they’re available from 9am to 7pm. The next morning, I finally connected with an agent named Driti, who didn’t even try to help. She offered no solutions and only made me more frustrated. Very disappointed !!!!!!!!!!!!

Great experience so far. Update on 21st May, 2026 - Still fantastic experience. I specially love the fruit and vegetables section, you get a lot of great products including imported products like avocado, english cucumber, zucchini, Chinese cabbage, just to name a few. Getting these wasn't easy before. I hope you keep up the good work and don't become complacent.

Very helpful app for ordering quick deliveries and a wide variety to choose from. Quick and good service in terms of time. Sometimes vegetables are not fresh (received rotten onions twice). Also they could provide more margin in discount.

the delivery is super quick and I have had a great experience throughout, however there's an issue I'm facing since the past few days I have updated my address but the delivery partners always end up in the previous one. In my order section, it shows that it will be delivered in my new address but for some freaking reason those guys are given my previous address to deliver the order & it's so annoying Kindly fix this issue 🙏🏻 regards

Great app for quick deliveries! Orders arrive within minutes, the interface is user-friendly, and product quality is good. A wide range of items is available, making it very convenient for daily needs. Highly useful in urgent situations.
There is no option to return or claim for refund when the item is in the worst case.! They just deliver speed, don't care if the item is consumable or not, especially food items.

blinkit is not trustable app.they provide replacement warranty in mobile accesories and after sales service is very very much poor. they simply denied instead of replacement within given time period. one should avoid purchasing from here.

Worst app I have hardly received any proper product from here Earpods worst lipstick worst broken I'll just try to use another app It doesn't allow to take video or photo. How the customer will raise issue. Also there is no separate customer support. very disappointed by blinkit. How can I get a refund??

I have been ordering for a long time from Blinkit and it was good. Today I have ordered 2 Amul paneer packets which looks fake, the packaging seems counterfeit. When I contacted the customer care the executive said that she noted my concern but cannot return/replace the product. This is way beyond understanding that a company of this level simply says that they can't do anything and they have mentioned that I can get the product replaced.

I added money to my Blinkit wallet because UPI and COD were not working, but now the wallet payment option is also unavailable. My money is stuck and I am unable to place any order for the last 4 days. This is a very disappointing experience. Please resolve the issue or refund my wallet balance.

I received the product with a broken seal and used product and they refused to replace the product and they were blaming the customer as the seal was broken, so we couldn't do anything like that they are saying, even though I opened the product in front of the camera. they watched the video and speculations about me without knowing anything
